meta.title: Curated GPT Image 2 (image2 / gpt-image-2) Prompts
meta.description: 50 ready-to-use prompts for OpenAI gpt-image-2 (released 2026-04-21). Curated from the most viral and practical examples on X, GitHub awesome lists and major prompt-sharing sites. Optimized for image2's strengths: native 2K/4K, pixel-perfect multi-script text rendering (Chinese / Japanese / English), accurate UI mockups, complex multi-element composition, character consistency.
core_tips: Front-load the subject in the first 30% of the prompt for highest weight.
Wrap any in-image text in straight double quotes for >95% rendering accuracy.
Specify lens (e.g. 35mm, 85mm), lighting (e.g. backlit, 3200K) and aspect ratio.
Avoid filler adjectives (8K, masterpiece) — use factual visual descriptions.
When editing an existing image, restate invariants ('same character, same outfit') to prevent drift.

prompts.title: Multilingual Vintage Travel Poster — Kyoto
prompts.prompt: A vintage travel poster for Kyoto in spring, advertising "BLOSSOM // KYOTO 2026". Top half: a stylized art-deco illustration of Mount Fuji silhouetted behind cascading cherry blossoms in pink, peach and cream tones. Bottom half: clean off-white panel with the headline "BLOSSOM" in tall serif uppercase, set kerned wide. Below it, a smaller line in elegant Japanese kanji reading "京都の春" (Kyoto no Haru — Kyoto Spring), perfectly legible. Tiny tagline beneath in lowercase: "april — may // shinkansen lines now open". Slight halftone print texture, faded edges, like a 1960s JNR rail poster.

prompts.title: Boston Spring 2026 City Poster
prompts.prompt: Striking Spring 2026 city poster for Boston with elegant celebratory mood and bold contemporary design. On clean off-white textured background with generous negative space, place a miniature single sculler in the lower-right corner rowing across a narrow ribbon of reflective water. Let the wake curve upward and gradually transform into the Charles River, then into a dreamlike hand-painted panorama of Boston featuring the Back Bay skyline, Beacon Hill brownstones, Acorn Street, Boston Public Garden, Swan Boats, the Zakim Bridge, harbor ferries, and historic brick architecture. Add soft morning fog, golden spring light, subtle crimson and gold festive accents, layered depth, and premium editorial typography reading "SPRING 2026" with a vertical slogan "BOSTON, A CITY OF RIVER, MEMORY, AND INVENTION". Vertical poster ratio, polished graphic-design finish.

prompts.title: BUILD 2026 Tech Conference Banner
prompts.prompt: A digital event banner for a tech conference called "BUILD 2026". Dark grey background with a subtle geometric grid pattern, faint scan lines and a soft cyan glow in the top-right. Title "BUILD 2026" in oversized white bold sans-serif, left-aligned, 60% of the banner width. Subtitle "THE FUTURE OF AGENTIC SOFTWARE" in thin uppercase, kerned wide, in cyan. Lower-right: dates "OCT 14 – 16 · SAN FRANCISCO" and a small registration QR code. 16:9 aspect ratio. Crisp text, no logo drift.

prompts.title: Coffee Shop A2 QR Poster
prompts.prompt: A modern minimalist coffee shop poster, A2 portrait. Cream background, single hand-drawn line illustration of a pour-over kettle and dripper centered upper third. Headline "SLOW POUR / SLOW MORNING" in mixed serif and italic, two lines. Mid-poster body text in small sans: "Single origin Ethiopia Yirgacheffe — bright, floral, citrus. Brewed every morning from 7:30." Bottom-right corner: a real scannable QR code labeled "MENU". Subtle paper grain. No watermark.

prompts.title: Detective Investigation Board
prompts.prompt: A cinematic photograph of a 1970s detective's investigation board pinned to a dim office wall. Cork board, red and black yarn connecting Polaroid photos of suspects, handwritten index cards reading "MOTIVE?", "ALIBI 22:14", "GREEN SEDAN", a folded newspaper headline "TOWN SHAKEN BY MURDER", a coffee-stained map of the city with a circled location, a desk lamp casting harsh side light, smoke drifting from an ashtray, shallow depth of field. Slight film grain, warm tungsten color cast. All handwritten text legible.

prompts.title: Crypto Trading Dashboard Mockup
prompts.prompt: A photorealistic screenshot mockup of a dark-mode crypto trading dashboard at 1440p. Left sidebar with 8 navigation items ("Dashboard", "Markets", "Portfolio", "Orders", "Funding", "Pro", "News", "Settings"), each with a small monochrome icon. Top header: search bar, BTC ticker showing "$74,218.40 +2.13%", account avatar. Main panel: candlestick chart "BTC / USDT — 1h" with green/red wicks, volume bars below, technical overlays (EMA 50, EMA 200), order book on the right with bids in green and asks in red, recent trades feed at the bottom. All numbers consistent. Crisp UI typography, real shadows, no logo drift.

prompts.title: Personal Finance App — Luma
prompts.prompt: A mobile UI mockup of a personal finance iOS app called "Luma", shown inside an iPhone 15 device frame. Status bar 9:41, full battery, 5G. Top: greeting "Good morning, Maya" with a small profile pill. Hero card with rounded corners showing "Total Balance · $12,840.27" and a subtle gradient. Below: a 7-day spending sparkline. Three quick-action chips: "Transfer", "Pay", "Invest". Section "Recent activity" listing 4 realistic transactions (e.g. "Whole Foods · -$48.12", "Spotify · -$10.99", "Stripe Payout · +$1,200.00"). Bottom tab bar: Home / Transactions / Cards / Goals / Profile. Soft drop shadows, system font, generous whitespace.

prompts.title: E-commerce Analytics Dashboard
prompts.prompt: A photorealistic screenshot of a SaaS e-commerce analytics dashboard in light mode at 1440p. Top KPI row of four cards: "Revenue · $84,210 · +12.4%", "Orders · 1,238 · +8.1%", "Avg Order · $68.02", "Conversion · 3.42%". Center: a smooth multi-line area chart titled "Revenue, last 30 days" with two series (this period, previous period) and a tooltip pinned on a peak. Right column: "Top products" table with thumbnails, names, units sold and revenue. Bottom: traffic source donut chart with legend (Direct, Organic, Paid, Email, Social). Inter typeface, subtle shadows, 8px grid alignment.

prompts.title: Hi-Fi Chinese E-commerce App Home
prompts.prompt: Generate a high-fidelity mobile e-commerce app homepage screenshot inspired by mainstream Chinese e-commerce apps in 2026. Status bar with 9:41, 5G, full battery. Top bar: city selector "杭州" on the left, rounded search box centered with placeholder "搜索耳机、咖啡机、运动鞋", message and scan icons on the right. Horizontal category tabs: "推荐 数码 家电 服饰 美妆 食品 运动 家居". Top promo carousel with the banner "618 预售开启" and a tag "每满300减50". 10-icon function grid with labels "超市 百亿补贴 秒杀 直播 充值中心 到家 领券 品牌馆 全球购 排行榜". Flash-sale module "限时秒杀" with a countdown 02:14:36 and three product cards. "猜你喜欢" two-column waterfall with 6 product cards (image, title, price, sales tag). Bottom tab bar: "首页 分类 购物车 消息 我的". All Chinese text crisp and readable, realistic spacing, shadows and dividers.

prompts.title: Museum-Style Hanfu Infographic
prompts.prompt: 请根据「汉服」生成一张博物馆图鉴式中文拆解信息图。整张图要兼具真实写实主视觉、结构拆解、中文标注、材质说明、纹样寓意、色彩含义和核心特征总结。整体风格为国家博物馆展板、历史服饰图鉴、文博专题信息图。背景采用米白与绢纸白质感。版式固定为：顶部中文主标题「汉服」加副标题「中华传统服饰图鉴」；左侧结构拆解区，中文引线标注关键部件（交领、广袖、襦、裙、腰带、蔽膝）；右上材质与工艺区（蚕丝、织锦、刺绣）；右中纹样、色彩与寓意区；底部穿着顺序流程图。所有文字必须为简体中文，清晰、规整、可读，不要乱码、错字。

prompts.title: WeChat Public Account Cover
prompts.prompt: 生成一张微信公众号封面图，主题是「AI Agent 实战指南」。画面为现代科技风格，背景有 AI 芯片轮廓、聊天气泡、代码片段，蓝紫色渐变光效。图片中必须清晰出现中文主标题：「AI Agent 实战指南」字号最大、居中偏左；副标题：「从零到上线，30 天让 LLM 真正干活」位于主标题下方；右下角小字「公众号 · 智能体周刊」。字体干净、清晰、无错别字、无乱码，适合公众号封面，留白合理，高级感强。

prompts.title: 618 E-commerce White Background Hero
prompts.prompt: 随手拍一个无线降噪耳机充电盒，帮我做成白底电商主图，重新打光，产品更精致。背景纯白，柔光，阴影自然且短而锐利，产品主体居中，反光高光提亮，材质质感明显提升。左上角添加一个红色圆形角标，里面写「618 直降」和小字「立省 ¥300」。右下角加一行小字「现货 · 顺丰发货」。整体符合天猫/京东主图规范，无水印，无多余装饰。

prompts.title: Holographic Trading Card
prompts.prompt: A premium holographic trading card, vertical 3:4 layout. Center: a cyberpunk samurai in a dynamic forward-leaning pose, vibrant cinematic backlighting in cyan and magenta. Border: ornate gold filigree with rune-like icons in the four corners. Top banner reads "LEGENDARY" in bold serif caps. Bottom panel: name plate "REI · NIGHTBLADE", three small stat icons (Power 92 / Speed 88 / Magic 71) with numeric values. Holographic foil effect with iridescent rainbow streaks, slight grain, soft studio backdrop. Crisp text, no logo drift.

prompts.title: Action Figure Blister Pack
prompts.prompt: A stylized 6-inch action figure of a young female astronaut, sealed inside a premium plastic blister pack, photographed straight-on. The figure stands in a confident pose with a cracked helmet under one arm and a small flag in the other hand. Cardboard backing with the headline "COSMIC EXPLORERS · WAVE 02" in retro space-age font, character name plaque "CDR. NOVA" in the lower band, three accessory cutouts on the right (helmet, flag, mini rover). Studio softbox lighting, high-detail plastic texture, glossy bubble reflections, clean white background.

prompts.title: Isometric Miniature Workshop
prompts.prompt: A 45° top-down isometric miniature 3D scene of a tiny indie-developer workshop diorama on a wooden display base. Soft refined PBR textures, realistic materials, clean unified composition, minimalist aesthetic. Tiny props integrated into the architecture: a glowing laptop with a deploy progress bar, a stack of books labelled "AGENTS", "SDK" and "DESIGN", a coffee mug, a plant. Studio softbox lighting, subtle ambient occlusion, pastel palette dominated by sage green and warm cream. Square 1:1 frame, centered subject, plenty of negative space.

prompts.title: 6-Panel Retro Superhero Comic
prompts.prompt: A 6-panel retro American superhero comic page in a 2×3 grid, drawn in 1980s Marvel/DC style: bold black outlines, flat primary colors (red, blue, yellow), Ben-Day halftone shading, slight aged paper texture, thin black panel borders with white gutters. Panel 1: female hero STARDUST in red cape and blue suit stands heroically. Caption: "METRO CITY — DUSK." Speech: "Trouble in the East District… time to fly!" Panel 2: villain PROFESSOR GRIM beside a glowing doomsday device. Caption: "MEANWHILE…" Speech: "In sixty seconds, this city will BOW to me!" Panel 3: Stardust bursts through a window. Large SFX: "KRA-KOOM!" Panel 4: Stardust punches the villain. Speech: "Not on my watch, Professor!" Panel 5: villain tied up, small robot dog beside Stardust. Speech: "Looks like class is dismissed, Doc." Panel 6: Stardust on a skyscraper overlooking the city. Caption: "CONTINUED NEXT ISSUE!" Consistent character design, classic all-caps comic lettering, vibrant inks. 16:9. No watermark.

prompts.title: Cyberpunk Noir Manga Page
prompts.prompt: A 2x2 black-and-white manga page in the style of late-90s seinen noir, screen-tone shading, sharp ink linework, dramatic angles. Panel 1 (wide top): rain-soaked neon-lit alley, lone detective in a long coat, narration box "Tokyo, 03:14. The case wasn't supposed to find me." Panel 2: close-up of detective's eyes under a wet brim hat, speech bubble "…So why is it on my desk?". Panel 3: he kicks open a metal door, SFX "DON!". Panel 4 (wide bottom): silhouette of a corporate suit at a window overlooking a megacity, speech bubble "You should have stayed asleep, detective." Right-to-left reading order, vertical sound effects in katakana, deep blacks, fine halftone.

prompts.title: Hitman in OpenAI HQ
prompts.prompt: An in-game screenshot from a Hitman-style stealth game. The level is set inside the OpenAI HQ in San Francisco, sleek glass walls, exposed concrete, branded meeting rooms named "GPT-6", "Sora", "Voice". Agent 47 in a dark suit and red tie is hiding behind a meeting room glass partition watching two engineers walk past with laptops. Top-left HUD: minimap, mission objective "STEAL GPT-6 WEIGHTS · NO WITNESSES", suspicion meter low. Bottom-right: silenced pistol icon, fiber wire icon. Cinematic teal-and-orange grade, depth of field on the foreground plant, console-game look.

prompts.title: GTA 6 Beach Walk Screenshot
prompts.prompt: GTA 6 in-game footage, very detailed, very realistic. Close-up tracking shot taken from a stationary 4K monitor of a young woman in a tank top and shorts walking along a Vice City beach with her golden retriever on a leash. Bright morning light, palm trees, neon hotel signs in the soft-focus background, jet-skis in the bay. Top-left HUD: minimap, health bar, weapon wheel hint. Bottom-right ammo counter "9mm · 12/120". Subtle film grain, faint chromatic aberration, modern open-world realism.

prompts.title: Black Myth Wukong Battle Frame
prompts.prompt: Generate a Black Myth: Wukong in-game cinematic frame. The Destined One (孙悟空) is mid-air, just knocked back by 二郎神's three-pointed double-edged spear. Sparks and shattered stone debris fly in all directions, golden Buddhist seals dissolving around the impact. Cliffside Tang-dynasty ruined temple in the background, swirling mist, deep red dusk sky. Lower HUD: stamina bar, health bar at 23%, focus orbs ×3, two skill icons on cooldown. Heavy cinematic motion blur, anamorphic flare, ultra-realistic Chinese mythological art direction.

prompts.title: Sam Altman Skatepark Snapshot
prompts.prompt: Sam Altman on a skateboard at an empty skatepark, late afternoon. Casual dad-vibe outfit: gray hoodie, blue jeans, white sneakers. Mid-roll on a mellow ramp, slightly off-balance, half-grin. Shot with an iPhone, slight motion blur, no people in the background, harsh sun shadows. Looks like a real candid photo someone took on the way home, not a posed editorial.

prompts.title: Tim Cook Apple Park Crowd Shot
prompts.prompt: Amateur iPhone photo at Apple Park during the iPhone 20 keynote, Tim Cook on the Steve Jobs Theater stage in front of a giant title slide reading "INTRODUCING IPHONE 20". Shot from the middle of the crowd at a distance, slightly tilted, raised hands and other phones in the foreground partially blocking the view. Dim auditorium, bright stage, slight glare on the lens, jpeg compression artifacts. No professional staging.

prompts.title: RAW iPhone Subway Blur
prompts.prompt: Create a completely RAW quality, unprocessed, unedited image with full iPhone camera quality. A subway station in NYC, a momentary motion blur as the train enters. In front of the train, an elderly woman and an elderly man waiting near the yellow line, both wearing winter coats. Tile walls, fluorescent overhead lights, faint reflections on the platform floor. No HDR pop, no AI sharpening, just an honest snapshot.

prompts.title: 2003 Digital Camera Family Snapshot
prompts.prompt: Generate a photo from 2003, shot with a low-resolution digital camera, of a five-year-old child with their mom and dad in the courtyard of a residential compound in China. Slight overexposure, harsh on-camera flash, red-eye effect, low dynamic range, bottom-right yellow date stamp "2003 07 18". Clothing typical of early-2000s mainland China: father in a polo shirt, mother in a floral blouse, child in shorts holding a popsicle. Concrete buildings, parked bicycles, a green tarp shade in the back.

prompts.title: 90s Point-and-Shoot Bedroom
prompts.prompt: A 1990s point-and-shoot 35mm film snapshot of a teenage girl sitting on her bed, holding a portable CD player, headphones around her neck. Posters of indie bands taped to the wall, a stack of magazines, fairy lights. Direct on-camera flash with hard shadow against the wall, slight red-eye, soft yellow-cyan color cast, heavy film grain, a small white date stamp "08 14 99" in the bottom-right corner. Composition slightly off-center, like a real personal photo.

prompts.title: Convenience Store Night Group
prompts.prompt: Create an ultra-realistic urban street group photo at a convenience store entrance at 10 PM, summer night. 3-4 young people briefly chatting, one holding a drink, one sitting on a plastic chair, one looking at their phone. Bright cool white light streaming through the glass doors and windows, warm yellow streetlights and distant car headlights outside. Everyday clothes: T-shirts, shorts, jeans, sneakers — no influencer styling. Faces and postures must look like real pedestrians, not overly polished. Real convenience-store details: freezer stickers, promo posters, a trash can, an entrance mat, glass reflections, a shared bike on the curb, water droplets from cold drink bottles on the ground. Looks like a candid photographer's slice-of-life shot.

prompts.title: 35mm Cafe Window Portrait
prompts.prompt: A young woman by a rain-streaked café window at dusk, reading a worn paperback. 35mm film aesthetic, soft window light from the left, warm tungsten fill from the café interior, rain droplets in sharp focus on the glass, the city outside in soft bokeh with red and amber bus lights. Quiet, contemplative mood. Visible film grain, slight halation in highlights, gentle desaturation in shadows. No phones, no logos.

prompts.title: Tokyo Yellow Raincoat Night
prompts.prompt: A cinematic photograph of a single figure in a bright yellow vinyl raincoat, hood up, walking down a narrow Tokyo alley at night. Wet asphalt mirror-reflects the neon signs in Japanese kanji and katakana on either side — "居酒屋", "カラオケ", "24時間". Steam rising from a vent, distant red lantern glow, anamorphic lens flare around the brightest sign. Shot on a 35mm anamorphic, slight grain, deep teal shadows, saturated highlights.

prompts.title: Hands Kneading Bread Dough
prompts.prompt: A close-up photograph of weathered hands kneading bread dough on a floured wooden surface. Soft directional window light from the upper-left, fine flour dust caught in the beam, visible skin texture and small flour smears, dough showing realistic stretch and surface tension. Background slightly out of focus showing a linen towel and a vintage scale. Warm earthy tones, shallow depth of field, square 1:1 crop, editorial cookbook feel.

prompts.title: Rice Grain Micro Typography
prompts.prompt: A massive pile of white rice grains, photographed with extreme macro lens at f/8. Shallow depth of field on a single grain near the center which has tiny, perfectly legible black engraved text reading "wOw". Soft daylight from above, gentle shadows between grains, no other text or markings on any other grain. Clean, almost scientific look. Aspect ratio 1:1.

prompts.title: Caustic Whiskey Glass Study
prompts.prompt: A cinematic still-life photograph of a cut-crystal whiskey tumbler with two ice cubes and amber whiskey, sitting on a polished black walnut surface. A single hard backlight produces sharp caustic light patterns through the crystal onto the wood. Tiny condensation droplets cling to the glass exterior, one slow drip running down. Dark moody background, slight smoke drifting through the beam. 100mm macro lens, f/5.6, no logos, no text.

prompts.title: Floating Sneaker Hero Shot
prompts.prompt: A high-end sneaker (clean white runner with mint accents) photographed floating in front of a deep matte black background. Hard rim light from the upper-right outlining the silhouette, soft fill from below, realistic suspended shadow on an invisible surface. Tiny dust particles drifting in the light. Glossy laces with realistic tension and individual fiber detail. Subtle motion-blur drag on a shoelace tip. Studio commercial look, no brand logos.

prompts.title: Artisan Honey Jar Label
prompts.prompt: Product photography of a single artisan honey jar on a soft cream paper background with a faint linen texture. The jar has a hexagonal silhouette, raw cork lid, twine wrap, and a label that reads "WILDFLOWER HONEY" in serif uppercase, beneath it "Harvest 2026 · 340g · raw / unfiltered" in small italic. Subtle illustration of a honeycomb and a single bee on the label. Slow honey drip down the side, soft top-down side light, gentle shadow on the right. No other text, label perfectly aligned and legible.

prompts.title: Watch on Navy Velvet Macro
prompts.prompt: A close-up macro photograph of a luxury automatic watch resting on dark navy velvet. Stainless steel case with brushed and polished surfaces, blue sunburst dial, applied silver indices, slim sword hands at 10:08. Shallow depth of field on the crown, fine fabric texture of the velvet, soft directional reflection on the polished bezel, faint warm reflection on the sapphire crystal. No brand logo on the dial — keep dial center clean. 100mm macro, f/4.

prompts.title: Solar Panel Infographic
prompts.prompt: A clean editorial infographic titled "HOW SOLAR PANELS WORK" with five labeled horizontal flow steps from left to right, each in its own rounded card with a simple line icon: 1) "SUNLIGHT HITS PANEL" (sun + panel icon), 2) "PHOTONS EXCITE ELECTRONS" (atom icon), 3) "DC ELECTRICITY GENERATED" (battery icon), 4) "INVERTER CONVERTS TO AC" (wave icon), 5) "POWERS YOUR HOME / GRID" (house icon). Soft pastel palette: sage, sand, cream, soft yellow. Light off-white background, thin connecting arrows, small footnote text "Source: U.S. DOE, 2025". Crisp readable typography, no watermark.

prompts.title: Earth Layers Educational Diagram
prompts.prompt: A clean educational diagram of Earth's interior layers shown as a quartered cross-section. From outside in: "CRUST" (thin grey-brown), "UPPER MANTLE" (warm orange), "LOWER MANTLE" (deep red-orange), "OUTER CORE" (bright molten yellow), "INNER CORE" (white-hot). Each layer labeled with its name, depth range in km (e.g. "0–35 km", "35–660 km", "660–2900 km", "2900–5150 km", "5150–6371 km") and a one-line description. Thin leader lines, soft pastel sky background, sans-serif labels, textbook style, all numbers correct.

prompts.title: Cell Structure Bilingual Diagram
prompts.prompt: 细胞结构示意图，包含细胞核（Nucleus）、线粒体（Mitochondria）、内质网（Endoplasmic Reticulum）、高尔基体（Golgi Apparatus）、核糖体、细胞膜、溶酶体。每个结构带中英文双语标注，使用细引线箭头清晰指示，各结构分层、配色柔和（淡蓝、柠黄、薄荷、玫瑰），白色背景，简洁生物教材风格，文字清晰无错别字，不要乱码。

prompts.title: Coffee vs Tea Comparison
prompts.prompt: A two-column comparison infographic titled "COFFEE vs TEA". Left column header "COFFEE" in espresso brown with a steaming cup icon. Right column "TEA" in matcha green with a teacup icon. Six metric rows, each with an icon and clear values for both sides: "CAFFEINE (mg / 8oz)" 95 vs 47, "ANTIOXIDANTS" High vs Very High, "AVG SERVE TIME" 4 min vs 3 min, "GLOBAL CONSUMERS" 1.0B vs 2.0B, "BEST PAIRS WITH" Croissant vs Mochi, "MOOD" Sharp focus vs Calm focus. Off-white background, thin dividers, friendly rounded sans-serif, small footnote "Illustrative figures, 2026".

prompts.title: ORIN Coffee Brand Logo Set
prompts.prompt: A logo system for a specialty coffee brand called "ORIN" presented on a single off-white sheet. Top-left: primary wordmark — "ORIN" in a confident geometric sans-serif, the letter O subtly formed by an abstract flame-leaf curl. Top-right: secondary monogram — just the stylized O on its own. Bottom-left: monochrome version (deep espresso brown). Bottom-right: small tagline lockup "ORIN — slow roasted, slow lived." Hairline grid guidelines barely visible. Crisp vector look, no watermark, no other extra text.

prompts.title: RIDGE Outdoor Brand Mark
prompts.prompt: A circular badge logo for an outdoor adventure brand called "RIDGE". Inside the circle: a stylized two-mountain silhouette with a small pine row at the base and a thin sunrise arc behind the peaks. Around the inside of the circle border, the text "RIDGE · ESTABLISHED 2026 · WANDER WELL" set in confident uppercase serif, kerned widely so it reads cleanly. Color: deep forest green on cream. Subtle linen paper texture beneath. No other elements, no watermark.

prompts.title: Premium Water Bottle Hiking Ad
prompts.prompt: A premium lifestyle ad for an insulated stainless-steel water bottle. A young woman hikes along a high-alpine ridge at golden hour, mountains receding into haze behind her, holding the bottle naturally at her side. The bottle is matte sage green with no visible logos. Top of frame: bold serif headline "BUILT FOR THE LONG WAY". Bottom: small sans-serif tagline "Hydration that goes the distance. — Vessel Co." and a small product shot in the corner with the line "24oz · 24h cold · 12h hot". Cinematic warm color grade, slight grain. 4:5 aspect.

prompts.title: Skincare Minimal Square Ad
prompts.prompt: A square minimalist skincare ad. Pale blush pink background with a soft top-down shadow, a single frosted-glass serum bottle centered with a subtle dropper. Top-third headline in modern serif: "YOUR SKIN. SIMPLIFIED." Below it in thin uppercase sans: "ONE BOTTLE · FIVE STEPS REPLACED". Bottom-right small product info "30ml · niacinamide · hyaluronic acid · ceramides" and a tiny brand mark "AERA". Crisp legible text, ample whitespace, magazine-grade composition.

prompts.title: Summer Sale Social Graphic
prompts.prompt: A vibrant summer sale Instagram graphic. Sunset gradient background (peach to coral), giant playful display headline "UP TO 50% OFF" in chunky rounded sans, slight bouncing baseline. Below in tighter sans: "SUMMER SALE — ENDS JULY 31". Three floating product cutouts (sunglasses, straw hat, tote bag) casting soft realistic shadows. Bottom-left CTA pill button: "SHOP NOW →". Bottom-right small handle: "@solstice.studio". Crisp text, square 1:1.

prompts.title: Surreal Koi Nebula
prompts.prompt: A surrealist digital illustration with a low-angle upward perspective. A giant translucent koi fish with iridescent scales swims through a dreamlike nebula, surrounded by vivid star clusters, drifting bubbles and faint orbital rings. A tiny silhouette of a human figure stands on a calm reflective water surface in the lower third, gazing up at the massive koi looming overhead. Soft watercolor blending into painterly digital brushwork, deep indigo to magenta sky, warm golden highlights on the koi. Vertical 9:16 composition, awe-inspiring scale, no text.

prompts.title: Watercolor Editorial Illustration
prompts.prompt: A dreamy watercolor illustration of a young woman walking a long-haired dog along a quiet European canal in autumn. Light impressionist aesthetic, loose visible brushstrokes and translucent washes in tones of dusty teal, ochre and faded rose. Soft blur on the edges, delicate morning light, falling leaves, minimalist approach with deliberate empty space. No text, no watermark. 3:4 portrait.

prompts.title: Epic Silhouette World Poster
prompts.prompt: Collectible epic poster featuring a young swordsman's side-profile silhouette as the main canvas. Inside the silhouette grows a complete fantasy world: floating islands, a winding river, distant temple ruins, drifting cherry blossoms, a small dragon coiled in the eye, and the swordsman's allies as tiny figures along the cheekbone path. Outside the silhouette: a deep indigo sky with constellations and ink-wash clouds. Cinematic poster meets dreamlike watercolor illustration, high-density detail, strong chiaroscuro, sacred-yet-ominous mood. Bottom: title "THE LAST INK" in elegant serif and a small tagline "a story drawn in one breath".

prompts.title: Impossible Escher Library
prompts.prompt: A surreal architectural illustration of an impossible library inspired by M.C. Escher: staircases that connect at right angles defying gravity, bookshelves on every plane including the ceiling, tiny robed figures climbing in multiple impossible orientations, soft warm lantern light from countless reading nooks, deep shadows in the unreachable corners. Subtle pencil-line architectural overlays, sepia and ink palette, fine cross-hatching, surreal but mathematically convincing perspective. Square format, no text.

prompts.title: Korean Idol 3×3 Grid Portrait
prompts.prompt: 9:16 vertical, Korean idol portrait photoshoot, 3×3 grid (nine frames) of the same young woman, perfectly consistent facial features, hairstyle and styling across all nine frames. Soft black-mist filter effect, slightly lowered contrast, blooming highlights, gentle film grain. Each frame has a distinct pose: looking down, side profile, hand near jaw, looking up, candid laugh, hair flip, soft smile, eyes closed, direct gaze. Outfit: cream knit cardigan over thin white tee. Studio with off-white seamless backdrop. Thin black frame separators between cells. No watermark, no text on the image.

prompts.title: CCD Flash Candid Snapshot
prompts.prompt: Mobile phone photo using a digital CCD camera aesthetic. Harsh on-camera flash, grainy, dim messy indoor lighting, candid snapshot feeling, slight motion blur, slightly green-yellow color cast typical of early-2000s CCD sensors. Subject: a young Asian woman mid-laugh holding a slice of pizza, sitting on the floor of a crowded apartment party with mismatched furniture and string lights. Date stamp "2025 11 04" small in the bottom-right. Looks like a real friend's phone photo, not editorial.

prompts.title: Detective's Investigation Slide Deck
prompts.prompt: A professional boardroom presentation slide rendered as if shown on a 16:9 monitor. Slide title in bold sans: "FY2026 MARKET OUTLOOK — AI INFRASTRUCTURE". Three KPI tiles across the top: "TAM · $42B", "SAM · $8.7B", "SOM · $340M". Below: a clean bar chart titled "Market growth 2021–2026" with subtle upward trend, value labels on top of each bar (3.1B, 6.4B, 11.2B, 18.9B, 28.4B, 42.0B), Y-axis labelled "USD (B)", X-axis years. To the right of the chart, three short bullet takeaways. Bottom-left footnote: "Source: AGI Research, 2026". Bottom-right slide number "04 / 22". Calm corporate palette of navy, white and amber. Crisp legible text, accurate numbers.
